keyPoints: IoT devices are driving the need for new network architectures and designs.
Key drivers behind the new architecture include device proliferation, data volume, and security concerns.
There are several IoT architectures, including Device-to-Device (D2D), Device-to-Cloud (D2C), and Edge Computing.
A simplified IoT architecture involves a centralized edge computing layer, device-to-edge communication, and edge-to-cloud communication.
Core IoT Functional includes device management, data processing, and analytics, which are essential for IoT applications.
